it does not process user input, perform network requests, or execute transactions.\n- All reports agree that the code is boilerplate, standard, and free of malicious behavior or obfuscation.\n- The malware score across all reports is consistently 0, indicating no malicious activity detected.\n\n---\n\n### Confirmed Issues:\n- **Presence of code:** The code matches the description;
